full_text:
Lu Zhi (Shiying) 魯芝 (世英)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Zhi (魯芝), styledShiying (世英), was born in Mei county, Fufeng commandery. Officer of Cao Shuang who fled the capital to warn his master. Sima Yan built him a mansion. Lu Zhi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Lu Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
